/CAL RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(D)/X SHELLY ITELSON ALSO APPEARS ONEHALF OF MR, BOROR,/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM SALINAS VALLEY STATE PRISON(CDC #B25687)/CTORD:GUILTY FINDING OF COUNT 1 SET ASIDE, AND MURDER CONVICTION OF COUNT 1 VACATED & DISMISSED/X:COURT RESENTENCES THE DEFENDANT TO THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF COUNT 1, PC192(A) OR PC192,1 IN 1969, VOLUNTARY MANSLAUGHTER,/DEF:IS RESENTENCED IN ACCORDANCE TO SENTENCING LAWS IN 1969 AS FOLLOWS:/CH2:SP 15Y/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 2 TO THE MAXIMUM TERMOF 10 YEARS, CONSECUTIVE/X:COURT STAYS THE SENTENCES ON COUNTS 3, 4, 5 &6,/X:TOTAL = 25 YEARS STATE PRISON,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVEDIN THE AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATED BY CDCR/2933,1(C)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF:WAIVES ANY EXCESS CREDITS TO THE EXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION PERIOD/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS RESTITUTION TO VICTIM, FINES & FEES DEEMED REMITTED,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/PAROLE70/PARDATE:AS DIRECTED BY CDCR/PAR70/
